description: The HR department has already added Sarah Connor to the staff list, but she cannot log in yet. Create a user account for her and link it to her existing staff record. Use the profile 'Teacher', username 'sconnor', and password 'Teacher@2025'. Ensure you link the account to the existing 'Sarah Connor' staff record rather than creating a new one. Login to OpenSIS with username 'admin' and password 'Admin@123'.
